name: Chorizo Soup

ingredients.item: carrots / 2 celery stalks / 2 medium onions / 2 cloves of garlic / 17:1

method: Put the broth in a saucepan and heat until boiling
• Put a large pan o n a high heat and add 2 tablespoons of olive oil
• Add all your chopped and sliced ingredients with the curry
powder and mix together with a wooden spoon. Cook for around
10 minut es with the lid askew, until the carrots have softened but
ill holding their shape, and the onion is lightly golden • Add
the boiling broth to the vegetables. Give the soup a good stir and
to a boil. Reduce t he heat and simmer for 10 minutes, until
the sweet potato is cooked through
Season with salt and pepper • Using an immersion blender or
liquidizer, pulse the soup until smooth and scatter over a little
chopped chile • Divide between your serving bowls and
A delicious soup which is lovely hot, o r cold with a squeeze of
lemon juice in the summer. My wife likes hers wit h a port ion of
the side, to dip into the soup - naughty but nice!
